attachments.fallback: Easy Method to backup Office 365 mailboxes? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you want a professional method to backup office 365 mailbox, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/office365-backup.php|SysInfo Office 365 Backup Tool Software>. This versatile tool backs up Office 365 mailbox data locally to PST, PDF, EML, MBOX, and CSV. It also facilitates Tenant-to-Tenant migration within Office 365, or to G Suite, Office 365, and IMAP. Key features include maintaining folder hierarchy, data integrity, a date ran…
